ab: kandri na kasedean i, marenang mi kan baelli na babayan muka i Balangaw kirepanauwa kan namalli na maranank.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: kemay mi i Taipe muisatr dra igiw muka i Balangaw.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: meredek mi i Balabgaw i, mipalidring druwa i siyataw kitrebunga kaniyam i namalli na maranak.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: adri adawill i siyataw tu ruma kan namalli na maranak. garemaremay i, meredek mi lla.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

ab: ullaya a matrina a puwarikanan dra gung. adallep kantu ruma kan namalli na maranak. midinsiya mi muka kana puwarikanan dra gung.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: a kadru mi kana puwarikanan dra gung i, tu pillangaw mi kan namalli na maranak muka pakana dra siri aw kurepadreka dra ba.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: a aremeng lla i, muka mi i sinki mekana.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: sadru a palidring i sinki. driyama, miutubay mi muka kadru.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: a muwaburek mi i, mukalladram mi lla dra tu tratrawaw dra trau na utubay. aw muisatr mi lla dra bas muruma.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: muruma mi lla i Taipe garem. muatrebungay lla nay tu utubay kan namalli na maranak?
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有？
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.
